title: Treasury Liquidity Drain: $150 Billion in Settlements Could Pressure Stocks and Crypto
shortdescription: Up to $150B in Treasury settlements may drain market liquidity, raising risks for stocks, crypto, and global markets as dollar funding and yen volatility rise.
description: Up to $150B in Treasury settlements may drain market liquidity, raising risks for stocks, crypto, and global markets as dollar funding and yen volatility rise.
author: Gwen John

title: Bitcoin Rebounds Above $60,000 but Analysts Warn of More Selling Ahead
shortdescription: Bitcoin recovered from its previous low on Friday, narrowly escaping a drop below the critical $60,000 level, but some market analysts predicted further selling ahead.
description: Bitcoin recovered from its previous low on Friday, narrowly escaping a drop below the critical $60,000 level, but some market analysts predicted further selling ahead.
author: Emma Chen

title: Asian Stocks Fall as Wall Street Tech Sell-Off Weighs on Global Markets
shortdescription: Asian shares fell Thursday after fresh declines in technology sectors weighed on Wall Street, reflecting global jitters over AI valuations.
description: Asian shares fell Thursday after fresh declines in technology sectors weighed on Wall Street, reflecting global jitters over AI valuations.
author: Henry Willy

title: Santander Acquires Webster Financial for $12.3 Billion to Strengthen U.S. Market Position
shortdescription: Banco Santander has agreed to pay $12.3 billion to acquire Webster Financial, a strategic move to bolster its presence in the U.S. market.
description: Banco Santander has agreed to pay $12.3 billion to acquire Webster Financial, a strategic move to bolster its presence in the U.S. market.
author: Gwen John
